# GitHub Repository Operations

This directory stores GitHub-facing repository automation and community metadata for AIForge.

## Scope

- Workflows, issue templates, pull-request templates, funding metadata, security policy, and repository community health files.
- Keep operational files small, explicit, and tied to repository maintenance.
- Do not store AI/ML source catalogs here; route those into the subject directories.

## Reference Links

- GitHub community profiles: https://docs.github.com/en/communities/setting-up-your-project-for-healthy-contributions/about-community-profiles-for-public-repositories
- GitHub issue templates: https://docs.github.com/en/communities/using-templates-to-encourage-useful-issues-and-pull-requests/configuring-issue-templates-for-your-repository
- GitHub Actions: https://docs.github.com/en/actions
- GitHub repository topics: https://docs.github.com/en/repositories/managing-your-repositorys-settings-and-features/customizing-your-repository/classifying-your-repository-with-topics

## Routing Rules

- Put workflow YAML in `workflows/`.
- Put issue forms in `ISSUE_TEMPLATE/`.
- Put launch/publicity notes in `../docs/launch/`.
